text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After a race, I actually catch sight of<n>Doto! In the
flesh! She's been slow<n>to improve recently, so I
get a glimpse<n>of her looking down...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I recognize the issue as her not<n>having entered
her "race-ready" state<n>yet, but apparently she
herself isn't<n>aware...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My trainer pushes me to share my<n>knowledge, but
I know I won't ever<n>stop yapping if I get started!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My worst fears come true as I end up<n>imposing
on my oshi and rambling on<n>at Mach two speed!
There's no way<n>this conversation is going to be
useful<n>to her!
